nasb.text: And they were casting out many demons and were anointing with oil many sick people and healing them.

esv.text: And they cast out many demons and anointed with oil many who were sick and healed them.

cnv.text: 趕出許多鬼，用油抹了許多病人，醫好他們。

ccb.text: 赶出许多鬼，为许多病人抹油，治好他们。

csbs.text: 他们驱赶了很多鬼魔，又用油来膏抹许多病人，使他们痊愈。
